# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: City Map Overlay: Visualize District Interactions in CodeGrind
- Summary: Spotlighting the revamped CityMap and scene components with a focus on District 01 interactions and cyberpunk city visuals. A static, announcement-style post highlighting UI and scene upgrades.
- Slug: codegrind-city-map-overhaul-prompt
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-city-map-overhaul-prompt
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-05-20-codegrind-city-map-overhaul-prompt.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now features enhanced CityMap and CityScene components that improve scene management for District 01, delivering a richer cyberpunk city experience and clearer walking interactions.
- CTA: Explore the District 01 update in CodeGrind and try the improved CityMap experience today.
- Visual brief: Static announcement-style image showing the cyberpunk District 01 city map with glowing routes, CityMap and CityScene panels visible, subtle UI elements, and an overlay caption: 'District 01 CityMap & Scene Update'.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
